title: Check why Nemesis still didn't veto Congress 29

log.context: Check why Nemesis still didn't veto Congress 29

Good — `centronias` is in `NEMESIS_STAKEHOLDERS`, so `nemesis_active` would have been `True`. The only thing preventing Nemesis from firing was the missing registration.

---

Here is the full diagnosis:

**Root cause: `congress_nemesis_check` was never registered with the Temporal worker.**
